choices.text: Multi-sig via Squads Protocol (2-of-3 or 3-of-5). Deployer hot wallet compromise = rug. Multi-sig requires coordinated approval. Or set --final to lock forever (trustless but unfixable).

questions.explanation: Squads multi-sig prevents hot wallet rug.

choices.text: Account substitution, missing signer checks, type confusion, missing PDA bump validation, reinitialization (init_if_needed twice), unchecked math overflow, sysvar substitution. Sealevel-attacks repo + Anchor's typed accounts mitigate most.

questions.explanation: Sealevel attacks: substitution, missing signer, type confusion.
